subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is, verily, the Promised One in My Hidden Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لهو الموعود فی کتابی المکنون و ما
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @living waters; water of life, @knowledge; recognition of God
